tiktok_script:
HOOK (0–8 sec): Here's a mindset shift that could change how you think about money forever — one income stream is a single point of failure.

BEAT 1 (8–25 sec): Think about it. If your job, your main gig, your one source of income disappears tomorrow — what's your backup? Most people don't have one. Not because they're lazy — because nobody taught them how to build one. That's a system problem, not a you problem.

BEAT 2 (25–50 sec): That's exactly why I put together the Passive Income Blueprint. It's a practical, plain-English guide to building your first digital income stream. No tech background needed. No huge startup budget. No subscription. It's $17 — one-time — and you keep it forever. It walks you through the real strategies people are using to create income that doesn't depend on showing up somewhere every single day.

BEAT 3 (50–75 sec): This isn't about getting rich overnight. It's about building a backup — a second layer — so one bad month doesn't wreck everything. That's what financial resilience actually looks like in 2026.

CTA (75–90 sec): The link is in my bio. Seventeen dollars. Yours forever. Go build your second stream — starting today.
